title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 12–15, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's the best dessert you've got, you lousy Cook!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Grab

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It can't be...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: serving that pile of crap for dessert...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is the worst restaurant I've ever been to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Woah! His body's gold and shiny!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: that bastard and his fancy steel armour...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Get him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Guns....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: from all over his body...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You damn worms think you can defy me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm the strongest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This steel arm, more powerful than that of anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This body of steel, tougher than anyone else's!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And this diamond fist that can pulverize anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My entire body is a finely tuned weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm the fleet Admiral of 50 ships and the commander of 5000 men!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've won every single battle I've been in! There is no other man more worthy of the title "don" than I am!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So if I tell you to prepare the food for my men,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then you shut up and do it!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Nobody goes against Don Krieg!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
